reviews.review_description:
Stunning game! If you wanna feel the burn 🔥 and build up a pump! This is your game! 

Boxing training in MR it’s great, I will update this review once I have played all the different scenarios but my first impressions are this is a brilliant game! 

Well done devs! Well worth adding to your library people.

Genre: Sports/Rhythm

Player Modes: Standing/Roomscale

Game Mode: Single User 

Language: English 

Platforms - Meta Quest Pro & Meta Quest 3.

This game has me literally hooked to it, it’s a very realistic work out, and you really do feel the burn 🔥 in your shoulders 😅 so much more being added to this game. 

🥊 - Rhythm Rumble brings the thrill of boxing right into your living room with an immersive mixed reality experience. Transform your space into a virtual gym where you can train like a pro boxer while enjoying the convenience of home.

🥊- Punch your way through rhythmic workouts where every move is synced to pulsating beats, creating an intense and engaging training session. With lifelike graphics and realistic environments, you'll feel like you're in the ring, perfecting your skills without ever stepping foot outside.

🥊- Whether you're a beginner learning the basics or an experienced fighter looking to sharpen your technique, Rhythm Rumble offers a variety of training modes tailored to all skill levels. 

🥊 - But the real excitement comes with Leaderboard mode, where you can go head-to-head with friends or other players. Test your skills in thrilling matches and climb the ranks to become the ultimate champion of Rhythm Rumble.

🥊 - With intuitive controls and addictive gameplay, Rhythm Rumble delivers an unparalleled VR boxing experience that's both challenging and fun. Whether you're looking to get in shape, improve your technique, or simply enjoy a great workout, Rhythm Rumble has something for everyone. So put on your gloves, clear some space, and get ready to rumble in the comfort of your own home! I’m
